Libya, Iraq discuss education cooperation MoU
article_snippet: Libyan Education Minister Mohamed Al-Qriyo and Iraqi Chargé d’Affaires Ahmed Al-Sahhaf discussed drafting a memorandum of understanding to strengthen cooperation in training and curriculum development. During a meeting at the ministry on Monday, the two sides reviewed cooperation in educational staff development, as well as cultural and student exchanges. Al-Qriyo also presented the ministry’s vision for advancing interactive and digital education.

headline_original: Saddam Haftar, Greek PM review military and economic cooperation
article_snippet: Deputy Commander-in-Chief of Haftar’s forces Saddam Haftar met with Greek Prime Minister Kyriakos Mitsotakis in Athens on Monday to discuss ways to strengthen military and economic ties between the two countries. According to a statement from the media office of Haftar’s forces, the talks covered cooperation in the security, military, and economic sectors, as well as several regional and international issues of mutual concern.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant

headline_original: French Ambassador, Khaled Haftar hold talks on military cooperation in Benghazi
article_snippet: French Ambassador to Libya Thierry Vallat and Khaled Haftar, Chief of Staff of Haftar’s forces, held what the French Embassy described as “productive and candid” talks in Benghazi, focusing on prospects for expanding military cooperation between the two countries. According to a statement posted by the embassy, France reaffirmed its support for efforts to unify Libya’s armed forces and reiterated its call for the withdrawal of foreign fighters and forces from the country as part of broader efforts to promote stability.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant

headline_original: Koury, Russian Ambassador discuss structured dialogue outcomes and election efforts
article_snippet: Russian Ambassador to Libya Aydar Aganin and Deputy Special Representative of the UN Secretary-General for Libya Stephanie Koury held talks on the UN-led political process, focusing on the outcomes of the structured dialogue and prospects for implementing Libya’s political roadmap. The meeting, held Sunday at the UN mission headquarters in Benghazi, also reviewed the latest political, economic, and security developments, according to statements from both the Russian Embassy and the UN Support Mission in Libya.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant

headline_original: Protesters shut down IOM office in Tripoli over migration policies

headline_original: Abdullah Naker announces initiative to establish Al-Hamada Al-Hamra Region
article_snippet: The Head of the Al-Qimma Party, Abdullah Naker, announced plans to launch a project for the establishment of the Al-Hamada Al-Hamra Region, encompassing a vast area stretching from Warsheffana in the east to Al-Zawiya and Zuwara in the west, and from the Western Mountains southward to Libya’s borders with Tunisia, Algeria, Chad, and Niger, including Mizdah, Al-Shuwayrif, Al-Shati, Ubari, Murzuq, and Ghat.

headline_original: Delegations arrive in Tripoli for African petroleum training forum

The event will bring together training officials, experts and specialists from member states to discuss capacity building in the energy sector.

headline_original: Egypt reiterates support for Libya’s unity in talks with Malta
article_snippet: Egypt’s Foreign Minister Badr Abdelatty has reaffirmed Cairo’s support for Libya’s unity, stability and sovereignty, calling for the unification of state institutions and a Libyan-led political solution free from external interference. His remarks came during a meeting on Monday with Malta’s Foreign Minister Chris Fearne on the sidelines of the 11th EU–Egypt Association Council.
qa_notes: Reliable date inside target window and Libya-relevant

headline_original: HCS rapporteur criticises UN mission’s role in structured dialogue
article_snippet: The rapporteur of the High Council of State (HCS), Belqasim Debriz, has criticised what he described as interference by UN mission staff in Libya’s internal affairs through the ongoing structured dialogue. Speaking to Al-Tanasuh TV, Debriz said some participants had called for adherence to the Libyan constitution, but a staff member from the UN mission rejected the proposal.

headline_original: Libya Investment Authority announces assets increase to $51.8 billion
article_snippet: The Libya Investment Authority (LIA) announced that its financial assets, including cash holdings, increased to $51.8 billion during the first quarter of this year, compared to $50.9 billion at the end of last year, marking a 1.7% increase. The growth was driven by a roughly $600 million rise in the market value of its equity portfolio, as well as $307.7 million in realized returns from dividends and interest on time deposits.

headline_original: حملة أمنية تخلي موقعاً عشوائياً وتضبط مخالفين بالمنطقة الصناعية في بوهديمة - ليبيا 24
article_snippet: ليبيا 24: واصلت إدارة العمليات الأمنية بجهاز مكافحة الهجرة غير الشرعية حملاتها الميدانية لإزالة التجمعات العشوائية وضبط المخالفين، حيث استهدفت المنطقة الصناعية بمنطقة بوهديمة تنفيذاً لتوجيهات القيادة العامة وتعليمات رئيس الجهاز. وأسفرت الحملة عن إخلاء موقع مؤجر بصورة عشوائية وغير قانونية، وضبط عدد من المخالفين المقيمين داخله من جنسيات مختلفة، بينها المصرية والتشادية والنيجرية والسودانية. وأوضحت الإدارة أن الموقع كان يشهد أوضاعاً غير صحية واكتظاظاً كبيراً، مع وجود مخالفات تتعلق بالاستهلاك العشوائ

headline_original: جهود الحكومة الليبية وصندوق التنمية.. بثبات نحو إعادة إعمار المدن وتأسيس بنية تحتية متينة لمستقبل أكثر استقرارًا - ليبيا 24
article_snippet: تسير ليبيا اليوم في طريق إعمار طويل، لا يكتمل إلا بالصادقين العاملين في الميدان، أولئك الذين يرون في البناء واجبًا وطنيًا لا مجرد مشروع مؤقت. وفي هذا الطريق، تواصل الحكومة الليبية تنفيذ جهود واسعة لإعادة الحياة إلى مؤسسات الدولة، وترميم ما أفسدته سنوات الصراع، وبناء بنية تحتية قادرة على دعم الاستقرار والتنمية. تعمل الدولة على إعادة تأهيل الطرق والجسور وربط المدن بمسارات حديثة تعزز الحركة التجارية وتسهّل تنقل المواطنين، إلى جانب صيانة شبكات الكهرباء والمياه وتطوير محطات التحلية والصرف الصحي لضمان

headline_original: الرئاسة الفلسطينية تؤكد رفضها القاطع لإقامة الاحتلال محور موراج - ليبيا 24

headline_original: تصاعد الانتهاكات الإسرائيلية بحق المقدسات الإسلامية - ليبيا 24
article_snippet: متابعات – ليبيا 24: وثّقت وزارة الأوقاف والشؤون الدينية الفلسطينية في تقريرها الصادر اليوم الخميس تصاعد الانتهاكات الإسرائيلية بحق المقدسات الإسلامية خلال شهر رمضان، حيث سجلت 21 عملية اقتحام نفذها مستوطنون للمسجد الأقصى المبارك. كما منعت سلطات الاحتلال رفع الأذان في الحرم الإبراهيمي الشريف 52 مرة، مما يعكس استمرار السياسات القمعية تجاه الممارسات الدينية. وبحسب التقرير الذي طالعته ليبيا 24، تمت الاقتحامات تحت حماية شرطة الاحتلال، إذ قام المستوطنون بالدخول عبر عدة بوابات، وجابوا ساحات المسجد بجولا

headline_original: الاحتلال يواصل جرائمه.. وصول 18 شهيدا إلى مستشفى غزة الأوروبي في خان يونس - ليبيا 24
article_snippet: متابعات – ليبيا 24: أفادت مصادر طبية طالعتها ليبيا 24، بوصول 18 شهيدًا، بينهم نساء وأطفال، إلى مستشفى غزة الأوروبي في خان يونس جنوب قطاع غزة، وذلك منذ صباح اليوم الأربعاء وحتى هذه اللحظة. وفي وقت سابق من مساء اليوم، استشهدت مواطنة وأُصيب عدد آخر من الأشخاص جراء قصف إسرائيلي استهدف خيمة تُؤوي نازحين في منطقة المواصي قرب خان يونس. كما أسفر قصف جيش الاحتلال الإسرائيلي عن سقوط ما لا يقل عن ثمانية شهداء وإصابات متعددة في حي السلام بمدينة خان يونس. وفي سياق متصل، أعلن المكتب الإعلامي الحكومي في قطاع غ

headline_original: قمة السبع وأوكرانيا.. ماكرون يعيد تموضع فرنسا بالوساطة الغربية (خبيران)

headline_original: Trump jokes with Meloni on sidelines of G7, 'I was abandoned' - TopNews - Ansa.it
article_snippet: Donald Trump joked with Giorgia Meloni on the sidelines of the G7 sumit in France Tuesday with the US president saying he had been abandoned by his friend over the Iran war, to which the Italian premier replied that he had not. (ANSA)

headline_original: Hostilities must stop in Lebanon too says Meloni - TopNews - Ansa.it
article_snippet: In a statement welcoming the deal reached between Washington and Tehran to stop the Iran war, Premier Giorgia Meloni said Monday that "hostilities must also cease in Lebanon". Meloni said that "Italy will continue working to support Lebanese sovereignty". (ANSA)

headline_original: Italy willing to take part in Strait of Hormuz naval mission - TopNews - Ansa.it
article_snippet: Italy is willing to take part in an international naval mission for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz after Washington and Tehran reached an agreement to end the Iran war, Premier Giorgia Meloni said on Monday. (ANSA)

headline_original: Nordio under fire over 'Mussolini signed the criminal code' comment - TopNews - Ansa.it
article_snippet: Justice Minister Carlo Nordio has come under fire for referring to the fact that the criminal code still in use in Italy was drafted during the Fascist period in order to criticise a Rome book fair, Più Libri Più Liberi, for asking publishers wanting to ta... (ANSA)

headline_original: Staffers suspended for secretly snapping women on Milan transport vehicles - General News - Ansa.it
article_snippet: The Milan transport staffers who secretly took pictures and videos of women with security cameras on ATM trams and buses and then shared the images in chat rooms accompanied by sexist comments have all been suspended from duty and pay, ATM said Tuesday. (ANSA)

headline_original: Asteroid named after Jannik Sinner - Science & Tecnology - Ansa.it
article_snippet: Asteroid named after Jannik Sinner ROME , 16 June 2026, 16:22 ANSA English Desk Share An asteroid has been named after Italian tennis player Jannik Sinner since last night. The Working Group on Small Bodies Nomenclature (WGDBN) of the International Astronomical Union (IAU) has ratified the assignment of the Italian champion's name to an asteroid orbiting in the main asteroid belt between Mars and Jupiter, adding it to the official bulletin. headline_original: Iran says the initial deal to end the war with the US requires Israel to withdraw from Lebanon
article_snippet: Iran’s top diplomat says the tentative deal to end the war with the United States would require Israel to withdraw from Lebanon — a condition Israel has already rejected and that could sink the agreement.

article_snippet: President Donald Trump and G7 leaders are focusing on the Ukraine war and Trump is considering reimposing sanctions soon on Russian oil shipments.

headline_original: B-52 was in the air a very short time before crashing and killing all 8 on board

headline_original: A Jenna Bush Hager imprint release is now in Oprah's book club

headline_original: Pizza Hut, overtaken by the arrival of delivery culture, will be sold for $2.7 billion
article_snippet: Pizza Hut's parent company is selling the 68-year-old chain for $2.7 billion. Yum Brands said on Tuesday that the private equity firm LongRange Capital will buy Pizza Hut's business outside mainland China for about $1.5 billion.

headline_original: McDonald's is serving fried apple pie again for America's 250th birthday

headline_original: Higher prices for gas, groceries and flights will likely outlast the Iran war

headline_original: البعثة الأممية بليبيا تنفي وجود برامج لتوطين مهاجرين

headline_original: ليبيا تجدد رفضها توطين المهاجرين ومحتجون يغلقون مقر مفوضية اللاجئين
